reasonCodes.missing_cash_payment: Order {{orderNumber}} is missing a recorded cash payment.
reasonCodes.missing_card_payment: Order {{orderNumber}} is missing a recorded card payment.
reasonCodes.missing_local_payment_row: Order {{orderNumber}} is missing its local payment record.
reasonCodes.partial_cash_payment: Order {{orderNumber}} still has unpaid cash remaining.
reasonCodes.partial_card_payment: Order {{orderNumber}} still has unpaid card remaining.
reasonCodes.split_payment_incomplete: Order {{orderNumber}} still has an incomplete split payment.
reasonCodes.unsupported_payment_method: Order {{orderNumber}} uses a payment method that must be collected manually.

fixCodes.missing_cash_payment: Open the order and collect the cash payment.
fixCodes.missing_card_payment: Open the order and collect the card payment.
fixCodes.missing_local_payment_row: Open the order and collect the expected payment again.
fixCodes.partial_cash_payment: Collect the remaining cash amount to continue.
fixCodes.partial_card_payment: Collect the remaining card amount to continue.
fixCodes.split_payment_incomplete: Complete all split-payment portions before continuing.
fixCodes.unsupported_payment_method: Review the order and collect the payment manually.

blockerReasons.parent_payment_not_synced: Waiting for the parent payment to sync first.
blockerReasons.parent_payment_missing_canonical_remote_: Waiting for the parent payment to receive its remote payment id.
blockerReasons.ambiguous_canonical_remote_payment: Multiple repaired payments match this adjustment. Manual review is required.

closeoutBlocked.single: Cannot close the day during {{stage}} because {{orderReference}} is still blocked: {{reason}}.
closeoutBlocked.multiple: Cannot close the day during {{stage}} because {{count}} sync items are still blocked.
